headline: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
summary: SpaceX has formally filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. This could lead to the largest IPO ever on Nasdaq under the ticker SPCX. The company reported $18.67 billion in revenue in 2025.

headline: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say?
summary: This Optimizer newsletter focuses on Google I/O and AI advancements. It discusses new gizmos and health-related 'potions.' The issue highlights innovations like Gemini for Science.

headline: Here are 42 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's annual Anniversary Sale, their biggest of the year, has launched. It offers significant discounts on all kinds of outdoor essentials. It's the perfect time to stock up on camping gear like tents.

headline: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
summary: Investing in an extra Nintendo Switch 2 controller can offer premium features. The $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller includes a 3.5mm headphone jack. It also boasts great-feeling buttons and wireless connectivity.

headline: Save 30% off the Bluetti AC70 768Wh 1,000W LiFePO4 Power Station During the AliExpress Memorial Day Sale
summary: Get 30% off the Bluetti AC70 Power Station during AliExpress Memorial Day Sale. This deal makes it $80 cheaper than on Amazon. It's sold directly by Bluetti, the original manufacturer.

headline: Supergirl Confirmed for Man of Tomorrow as a "Major Part" of the DCU Going Forward
summary: Supergirl is confirmed to appear in the upcoming film Man of Tomorrow. DC Studios co-CEO Peter Safran states she will be a key piece of the DC universe. She is a "major part of what we’re doing" for the DCU's future.

headline: The Boys Is Officially Over, and the Internet Has Plenty of Thoughts
summary: Amazon has released the long-awaited series finale for The Boys. The ending has sparked a wide variety of reactions from fans online. The show's conclusion is now a major topic of discussion.

headline: The Adventures of Cliff Booth Lands IMAX Release Date Ahead of Netflix Debut
summary: David Fincher's sequel to Once Upon a Time in Hollywood will hit IMAX theaters. "The Adventures of Cliff Booth" gets a two-week exclusive IMAX run starting November 25th. It will then debut on Netflix on December 23rd.

headline: Russian jets 'dangerously' intercept RAF spy plane over Black Sea
summary: Russian jets dangerously intercepted an unarmed RAF Rivet Joint surveillance aircraft. The incident occurred over the Black Sea during a "routine international flight." The Ministry of Defence confirmed the event.

headline: Women who died in sea off Brighton were sisters
summary: Three women who died in the sea off Brighton have been identified as sisters. Their father expressed profound grief, stating "no words can truly describe the pain." The tragic loss has deeply affected the family.

headline: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
summary: The government has extended the fuel duty freeze until the end of the year. This continues the 5p cut initially introduced in March 2022. The measure aims to alleviate costs for motorists.

headline: Southampton lose appeal against play-off expulsion
summary: Southampton has lost their appeal against expulsion from the Championship play-off final. The club was penalized due to alleged spying activities. This decision confirms their removal from the competition.
